mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS salesDate, (SELECT NVL(SUM(pay_amount), 0) FROM payment WHERE TRUNC(pay_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND pay_status = 'PAID') AS payAmount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payment WHERE TRUNC(pay_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND pay_status = 'PAID') AS payCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM refund WHERE TRUNC(refund_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)) AS refundCount, (SELECT NVL(SUM(refund_amount), 0) FROM refund WHERE TRUNC(refund_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)) AS refundAmount FROM DUAL

SELECT TO_CHAR(d.dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD (DY)') AS salesDate, NVL(p.payCount, 0) AS payCount, NVL(p.payAmount, 0) AS payAmount, NVL(r.refundCount, 0) AS refundCount, NVL(r.refundAmount, 0) AS refundAmount, NVL(p.payAmount, 0) - NVL(r.refundAmount, 0) AS netAmount FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) - LEVEL + 1 AS dt FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 7 ) d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TRUNC(pay_date) AS dt, COUNT(*) AS payCount, SUM(pay_amount) AS payAmount FROM payment WHERE pay_status = 'PAID' GROUP BY TRUNC(pay_date) ) p ON d.dt = p.dt LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TRUNC(refund_at) AS dt, COUNT(*) AS refundCount, SUM(refund_amount) AS refundAmount FROM refund GROUP BY TRUNC(refund_at) ) r ON d.dt = r.dt ORDER BY d.dt DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY"년" MM"월"') AS salesDate, (SELECT NVL(SUM(pay_amount), 0) FROM payment WHERE TO_CHAR(pay_date, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM') AND pay_status = 'PAID') AS payAmount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payment WHERE TO_CHAR(pay_date, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM') AND pay_status = 'PAID') AS payCount FROM DUAL

SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYY"년" MM"월"') AS salesDate, (SELECT NVL(SUM(pay_amount), 0) FROM payment WHERE TO_CHAR(pay_date, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYY-MM') AND pay_status = 'PAID') AS payAmount FROM DUAL

SELECT m.month_str AS salesDate, NVL(p.payCount, 0) AS payCount, NVL(p.payAmount, 0) AS payAmount, NVL(r.refundAmount, 0) AS refundAmount, NVL(p.payAmount, 0) - NVL(r.refundAmount, 0) AS netAmount FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') || '년 ' || LPAD(LEVEL, 2, '0') || '월' AS month_str, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') || '-' || LPAD(LEVEL, 2, '0') AS ym FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 12 ) m LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TO_CHAR(pay_date, 'YYYY-MM') AS ym, COUNT(*) AS payCount, SUM(pay_amount) AS payAmount FROM payment WHERE pay_status = 'PAID' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(pay_date, 'YYYY-MM') ) p ON m.ym = p.ym LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TO_CHAR(refund_at, 'YYYY-MM') AS ym, SUM(refund_amount) AS refundAmount FROM refund GROUP BY TO_CHAR(refund_at, 'YYYY-MM') ) r ON m.ym = r.ym WHERE m.ym <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY m.ym DESC
SELECT COUNT(r.res_no) FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN guest_detail g ON r.guest_id = g.member_id LEFT JOIN space_unit su ON r.unit_no = su.unit_no LEFT JOIN space s ON su.space_no = s.space_no

SELECT r.res_no AS resNo, '#' || r.res_no AS resNoStr, r.guest_id AS guestId, g.name AS guestName, s.space_name AS spaceName, TO_CHAR(r.res_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || LPAD(r.start_time, 2, '0') || ':00' AS resDate, NVL(p.pay_amount, 0) AS amount, TO_CHAR(p.pay_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS payDate, p.pay_status AS payStatus, CASE r.status WHEN 'RESERVED' THEN '예약완료' WHEN 'CANCELLED' THEN '취소됨' WHEN 'COMPLETED' THEN '이용완료' WHEN 'PENDING' THEN '보류중' ELSE r.status END AS resStatus, CASE r.status WHEN 'RESERVED' THEN 'status-reserved' WHEN 'CANCELLED' THEN 'status-cancelled' WHEN 'COMPLETED' THEN 'status-completed' WHEN 'PENDING' THEN 'status-pending' ELSE 'status-default' END AS statusColor FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN guest_detail g ON r.guest_id = g.member_id LEFT JOIN space_unit su ON r.unit_no = su.unit_no LEFT JOIN space s ON su.space_no = s.space_no LEFT JOIN payment p ON r.res_no = p.res_no
ORDER BY r.res_no DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT r.res_no AS resNo, '#' || r.res_no AS resNoStr, r.guest_id AS guestId, g.name AS guestName, s.space_name AS spaceName, TO_CHAR(r.res_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || LPAD(r.start_time, 2, '0') || ':00' AS resDate, NVL(p.pay_amount, 0) AS amount, TO_CHAR(p.pay_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS payDate, p.pay_status AS payStatus, r.status AS resStatus, CASE r.status WHEN 'RESERVED' THEN '예약완료' WHEN 'CANCELLED' THEN '취소됨' WHEN 'COMPLETED' THEN '이용완료' WHEN 'PENDING' THEN '보류중' ELSE r.status END AS settlementStatus, CASE r.status WHEN 'RESERVED' THEN 'status-reserved' WHEN 'CANCELLED' THEN 'status-cancelled' WHEN 'COMPLETED' THEN 'status-completed' WHEN 'PENDING' THEN 'status-pending' ELSE 'status-default' END AS statusColor FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN guest_detail g ON r.guest_id = g.member_id LEFT JOIN space_unit su ON r.unit_no = su.unit_no LEFT JOIN space s ON su.space_no = s.space_no LEFT JOIN payment p ON r.res_no = p.res_no WHERE r.res_no = #{resNo}
